title: Apple Music is getting a price hike
summary: Apple is increasing prices for Music streaming, with individual plans rising to $11.99/month (up $1), family plans to $19.99/month (up $3), and student plans to $6.99/month (up $1). The company attributes the increases to rising licensing costs. Price hikes are also affecting UK, European, and other international markets.
content:
Apple Music is more expensive now. In the US, an individual plan now costs $11.99 per month, a $1 bump up from the previous $10.99 price. A family plan now costs $19.99 per month, up from $16.99, and a student plan costs $6.99 per month, up from $5.99. Apple, in a statement to Music Business Worldwide, says it is increasing prices "as a result of rising licensing costs."
Music Business Worldwide also reports that prices gone up in the UK and Europe, and the publication "understands" that hikes are hitting other countries as well. Apple didn't immediately reply to a request for comment from The Verge.
Apple Music last got a price increase i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果音乐涨价
zh.summary: 苹果公司正在提高音乐流媒体价格，个人订阅计划上涨至$11.99/月（涨价$1），家庭计划上涨至$19.99/月（涨价$3），学生计划上涨至$6.99/月（涨价$1）。公司将价格上涨归咎于版权许可成本增加。价格上涨也影响了英国、欧洲和其他国际市场。

title: I replaced my space heater and ceiling fan with one Dyson appliance
summary: Dyson has introduced the Hot+Cool HF1, a bladeless appliance designed to replace separate space heaters and ceiling fans with a single year-round climate control device. The product emphasizes quiet operation and simple controls as part of Dyson's multi-function approach to home heating and cooling.
content: Designed for year-round comfort, the Dyson Hot+Cool HF1 combines quiet operation and simple controls with Dyson's signature bladeless design.

zh.title: 我用一台戴森电器替代了空间加热器和天花板风扇
zh.summary: 戴森推出了Hot+Cool HF1，这是一款无叶片电器，设计用来用单一的全年气候控制设备替代独立的空间加热器和天花板风扇。该产品强调安静运行和简洁控制，是戴森多功能家庭取暖和制冷方案的一部分。

title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
summary: Apple has filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging misconduct reaching company leadership including its chief hardware officer and claiming over 400 former Apple employees now work there. The lawsuit poses timing risks for OpenAI's reported plans to pursue an initial public offering.
content: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]

zh.title: 苹果的大诉讼如何可能扰乱OpenAI的IPO计划
zh.summary: 苹果已对OpenAI提起商业秘密诉讼，指控其涉及公司领导层（包括首席硬件官）的不当行为，并声称超过400名苹果前员工现在在该公司工作。这起诉讼对OpenAI报告的首次公开募股计划构成了时间风险。

title: Apple’s plot to crush OpenAI
summary: Apple is suing OpenAI in a high-profile legal battle, though experts debate whether the allegations reflect typical industry practices or genuine misconduct. The lawsuit coincides with Apple's launch of new AI features including an updated Siri, raising questions about competitive motivations.
content:
Apple is suing OpenAI. The complaint is readable and intense, as these things often are, though many experts seem to think many of the allegations are just the ways things are done. So what does Apple really want here, and why is it picking such a public fight with OpenAI?
On this episode of The Vergecast, Nilay and David go through the lawsuit, and look at Apple's history of splashy litigation to determine whether Apple is worried about a possible competitor or simply looking to capitalize on a weak moment for OpenAI. All this is happening as Apple ships the public betas of its new software, headlined by the new Siri AI, and we have though …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果打压OpenAI的计划
zh.summary: 苹果正在与OpenAI进行一场备受关注的法律诉讼，尽管专家对这些指控是否反映了典型的行业实践或真正的不当行为存在争议。这场诉讼与苹果推出新AI功能（包括更新的Siri）同时进行，引发了关于竞争动机的问题。

title: Troubling new details emerge on diabetes ouster controversy
summary: The American Diabetes Association blocked publication of op-ed articles, prompting authors to release them as preprints instead. The incident raises concerns about editorial control and transparency within health advocacy organizations.
content: American Diabetes Association blocked publication of op-ed articles so the authors posted them as a preprint.

zh.title: 关于糖尿病协会驱逐争议的令人担忧的新细节
zh.summary: 美国糖尿病协会阻止了评论文章的发表，促使作者改为将其作为预印本发布。这一事件引发了对健康倡导组织内部编辑控制和透明度的关注。

title: Asus’ top-end 4K QD-OLED gaming monitor is $400 off
summary: Asus's high-end 32-inch 4K QD-OLED gaming monitor is discounted to $899.99 from $1,299.99 across major retailers, featuring a 240Hz refresh rate and inky blacks ideal for fast-paced gaming. The monitor includes a proximity sensor to reduce burn-in risk and extensive connectivity options including USB-C with 90W charging.
content:
The discounted Asus QD-OLED in all its glory. | Image: The Verge	

The Asus ROG Swift 32-inch 4K QD-OLED gaming monitor has almost everything I want in a high-end gaming monitor, most notably a QD-OLED panel for inky black levels and vivid colors that go beyond what’s possible on an LCD screen. Amazon, Best Buy, and B&H Photo have this model on sale for $899.99 (usually $1,299.99). It’s particularly well-suited for fast-paced games with its 240Hz refresh rate, and G-Sync variable refresh rate to prevent screen tearing.
This monitor has been available for this price for most of July. We’re not sure how long the deal will stick around for, but Asus is likely trying to move units at a discount so it can put more focus on its newer $1,299.99 model that has a Tandem QD-OLED display and slightly better specs.
Asus ROG Swift OLED PG32UCDMR

Where to Buy:

 $1299.99 $899.99 at Amazon
 $1299.99 $899.99 at Best Buy
 $1299.99 $899.99 at B&H Photo

The port selection is good, comprised of a DisplayPort 2.1 input, a pair of HDMI 2.1 ports, and USB-C for video via DisplayPort alt mode (with 90W of charging power), plus a USB 3.2 Gen 1 hub with three Type-A ports. A unique feature is that this and several other Asus OLED monitors have a proximity sensor that let it turn off when you walk away to reduce the risk of burn-in. It has a three-year warranty that covers burn-in with normal use.
Other deals to consider
Newegg has Marathon for Steam on sale for $21.99 when you apply the coupon code EPF5365 at checkout. The notoriously difficult extraction shooter from Bungie is gorgeous and more inviting to new players in its second season that’s currently available. This is the cheapest price we’ve seen if you’re looking to start your career as a runner, and great timing ahead of the experimental PvE mode that’s launching on July 21st.
A perennial favorite in our deal coverage, the Anker Nano Smart Display Charger Block is on sale for $25.99 at Best Buy and Amazon. The compact 45W USB-C p

zh.title: 华硕顶级4K QD-OLED游戏显示器便宜400美元
zh.summary: 华硕高端32英寸4K QD-OLED游戏显示器在各大零售商处从1299.99美元降价至899.99美元，具有240Hz刷新率和适合快速游戏的深黑色。该显示器包含接近传感器以降低烧屏风险，以及包括支持90W充电的USB-C在内的广泛连接选项。

title: Will Russia's answer to the Falcon 9 rocket ever take flight?
summary: Russia is developing a reusable rocket to compete with SpaceX's Falcon 9, with grasshopper-style test flights potentially beginning in 2028. The project represents Russia's effort to maintain independent space launch capabilities.
content: Grasshopper-like tests could begin in 2028.

zh.title: 俄罗斯版猎鹰9号火箭何时才能升空?
zh.summary: 俄罗斯正在开发可重复使用的火箭以与SpaceX的猎鹰9号竞争,蝗虫式测试飞行可能在2028年开始。该项目代表俄罗斯维持独立太空发射能力的努力。

title: Fubo hikes prices by $15 after restoring some NBCU channels lost in November
summary: Streaming service Fubo has raised prices by $15 following restoration of some NBC Universal channels lost in a November dispute. However, subscribers still lack access to Versant channels, leaving the service's lineup incomplete.
content: Fubo subscribers still don't have Versant channels.

zh.title: Fubo在恢复11月丢失的部分NBC环球频道后提价15美元
zh.summary: 流媒体服务Fubo在恢复11月纠纷中丢失的部分NBC环球频道后,价格上涨了15美元。但订户仍然无法访问Versant频道,导致该服务的频道库不完整。

title: FBI arrests man accused of using Steam games to drain victims’ crypto wallets
summary: Federal prosecutors have charged 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins with publishing malware-infected fake video games on Steam that infected thousands of victims and stole cryptocurrency from their wallets. The operation distributed at least eight malicious games over an extended period.
content: Prosecutors accused 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins of publishing on Steam several fake video games that contained malware, infecting thousands of victims, and stealing crypto from some of them.

zh.title: FBI逮捕涉嫌利用Steam游戏窃取受害者加密货币的男子
zh.summary: 联邦检察官指控21岁学生Zyaire Wilkins在Steam上发布含恶意软件的虚假视频游戏,感染了数千受害者并从其钱包中盗取加密货币。该操作在较长时间内分发了至少8款恶意游戏。

title: Parents want safer phones for kids. These companies are answering the call.
summary: As parents seek alternatives to unrestricted smartphones, a growing number of companies are launching phones specifically designed for children, ranging from feature-limited mobile devices to minimalist home phones. The trend reflects parental concerns about screen time and content exposure.
content: As parents look for alternatives to unrestricted smartphones, a growing number of companies are building phones designed specifically for kids, from feature-limited mobile devices to minimalist home phones.

zh.title: 家长想要更安全的儿童手机。这些公司正在应对这一呼声。
zh.summary: 随着家长寻求不受限制智能手机的替代品,越来越多的公司推出专为儿童设计的手机,从功能受限的移动设备到极简主义家庭电话。这一趋势反映了家长对屏幕时间和内容接触的担忧。

title: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores
summary: San Francisco authorities have ordered Apple and Google to remove nudify applications from their app stores, with officials estimating the companies earned millions in fees from these apps. The move addresses concerns about non-consensual intimate imagery generation technology.
content: Official estimates Google and Apple likely made millions in nudify app fees.

zh.title: 旧金山命令苹果、谷歌从应用商店移除裸体化应用
zh.summary: 旧金山当局已命令苹果和谷歌从其应用商店中移除裸体化应用,官员们估计这些公司从这些应用中赚取了数百万美元的费用。此举解决了对非共识亲密影像生成技术的担忧。

title: Samsung’s redesigned Z Fold 8 with a wide display just leaked
summary: Leaked images reveal Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 ahead of the July 22nd official announcement, showing a shorter, wider design with a Snapdragon 8 Elite processor and dual 50MP rear cameras. Samsung is also launching a Z Fold 8 Ultra variant with enhanced display technology.
content:
Leaker Evan Blass shared images of Samsung's redesigned Galaxy Z Fold 8 just days before the July 22nd launch event where Samsung is expected to officially announce the phone.
The leaked images show a shorter, wider foldable matching earlier leaks of the Z Fold 8. They also reveal some of its specs, including a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite For Galaxy processor, 50MP wide and 50MP ultra wide rear cameras, 10MP selfie cameras on the inside and outside screens, and an advertised battery life of "up to 26 hours of video playback." 
Blass also posted images of the Galaxy Z Flip 8 and shared images of the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra in an email receive …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星重新设计的宽屏 Z Fold 8 刚刚泄露
zh.summary: 泄露的图像在7月22日官方发布会之前揭示了三星重新设计的 Galaxy Z Fold 8,展示了更短、更宽的设计,配备高通骁龙8 Elite处理器和双50MP后置摄像头。三星还推出了具有增强显示技术的 Z Fold 8 Ultra 变体。

title: Ars is looking for a senior technology reporter, and you might be it!
summary: Ars Technica is hiring a senior technology reporter with expertise in hardware including desktops, laptops, phones, CPUs, GPUs, and storage systems. The position offers an opportunity for an experienced tech journalist to join the publication.
content: Desktops, laptops, phones, CPUs, GPUs, NAS—if you know this stuff, come work for us!

zh.title: Ars正在寻找高级科技记者，那个人可能就是你！
zh.summary: Ars Technica正在招聘一名高级科技记者，需具备硬件相关专业知识，包括台式电脑、笔记本电脑、手机、CPU、GPU和存储系统。该职位为经验丰富的科技记者加入该出版物提供了机会。

title: Is America ready for this quirky Jeep-looking EV that can park itself?
summary: Chip Motors, a Miami-based startup, has launched a compact, open-air electric vehicle combining elements of golf carts and Jeep Wranglers in a boxy, quirky design. The vehicle represents a growing trend of microcar alternatives that may signal changing American attitudes toward downsized vehicles.
content:
Are we living through a small car renaissance? There's the Slate Truck, Amble's dune buggy, and the Fiat Topolino, as well as a whole galaxy of kei cars and trucks from Japan that have their own built-in fan base. While microcar sales in the US are still as tiny as the vehicles themselves, there are some signs that Americans might not be as closed off to the idea of downsizing as you might think.
The latest example is the launch of Chip Motors, a Miami-based startup with an adorably boxy, open-air electric vehicle that defies easy categorization. Is it a golf cart? A Jeep Wrangler that got hit with a shrink ray? A bit of both?
The company  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 美国准备好迎接这款古怪的Jeep风格电动车自动泊车功能吗？
zh.summary: 总部位于迈阿密的初创公司Chip Motors推出了一款紧凑型露天电动车，结合了高尔夫球车和Jeep牧马人的元素，设计风格古怪方正。该车型代表了微型车替代品的增长趋势，可能预示美国人对小型车态度的改变。

title: Florida man arrested for allegedly stealing over $200,000 in crypto using Steam game malware
summary: Federal authorities arrested 21-year-old Zyaire Wilkins for allegedly stealing over $220,000 in cryptocurrency through malware embedded in Steam games distributed between May 2024 and February 2026. The operation reportedly infected approximately 8,000 devices and compromised at least 80 crypto wallets.
content:
A final hearing will take place in June. | The Verge / Beatrice Sala	

Federal authorities have arrested a Florida man suspected of stealing at least $220,000 in crypto through malware-infected Steam games, as reported earlier by local news outlet Local10. In the complaint, officials accuse 21-year-old Zyaire Wilkins and co-conspirators of launching eight malware-embedded games from around May 2024 to February 2026, allowing them to infect about 8,000 devices and gain access to 80 crypto wallets.
Though the complaint doesn't specifically say the games were uploaded to Steam, it's likely referring to the Valve-owned gaming platform. As noted by Local10, the FBI put out a call for victim information in a "Steam  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 佛州男子因利用Steam游戏恶意软件盗窃超20万美元加密货币被逮捕
zh.summary: 联邦当局逮捕了21岁的Zyaire Wilkins，他涉嫌通过嵌入在2024年5月至2026年2月期间分发的Steam游戏中的恶意软件盗窃了超过22万美元的加密货币。该操作据报导感染了约8000台设备，并危及至少80个加密钱包。

title: Trump is selling high-speed access to his market-moving Truth Social posts
summary: Trump Media is launching a 'Truth API' on August 1st offering Wall Street faster access to the president's market-moving posts on Truth Social. The Trump family are the platform's largest shareholders, creating significant conflicts of interest. This raises concerns about preferential information access that could influence financial markets.
content:
Trump Media, the company behind Truth Social, is selling Wall Street faster access to the "most market-moving" posts on the US President's social media platform. On Thursday, Trump Media announced plans to launch "Truth API," a licensed real time data feed for businesses that provides "the fastest access to Truth Social's most influential accounts." It goes live on August 1st.
Similar APIs are common across other social media networks, but those aren't as fraught with conflicts of interest. While Trump Media hasn't disclosed how much the API service will cost, it stands to benefit the Trump family, with them being the largest shareholder in …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普出售其市场影响Truth Social帖子的高速访问权
zh.summary: 特朗普传媒将于8月1日推出"Truth API"，为华尔街提供更快访问总统在Truth Social上市场影响力帖子的途径。特朗普家族是该平台最大股东，造成了重大利益冲突。这引发了对可能影响金融市场的优先信息获取权的担忧。

title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
summary: A $400 million chip-backed loan signals investors are shifting focus from GPU providers to inference chip companies in AI infrastructure financing. This deal represents an emerging wave of infrastructure investments moving beyond training capabilities toward inference-focused solutions.
content: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.

zh.title: 为什么首批GPU融资方在4亿美元交易中转向推理芯片
zh.summary: 一笔4亿美元的芯片支持贷款表明投资者在AI基础设施融资中的重点从GPU提供商转向推理芯片公司。这笔交易代表了基础设施投资从超越训练能力转向推理聚焦解决方案的新趋势。

title: The report oil companies are worried about: Climate attribution science
summary: A new report demonstrates scientists are improving their ability to directly attribute specific weather damages to climate change through attribution science. This strengthens the scientific foundation for connecting extreme weather events to human-caused climate change.
content: New report says our ability to tie weather damages to climate change is improving.

zh.title: 石油公司担忧的报告：气候归因科学
zh.summary: 一份新报告表明科学家正在改进他们通过归因科学直接将特定天气灾害归因于气候变化的能力。这加强了将极端天气事件与人为气候变化联系起来的科学基础。

title: FCC took pricey gifts from Paramount as the company needed approval for deals
summary: The FCC chair received at least $63,000 worth of tickets from CBS or parent company Paramount while the company was seeking regulatory approval for major deals. The gifts raise ethics and conflict of interest concerns regarding the regulator's decision-making independence.
content: FCC chair has been gifted at least $63,000 worth of tickets by CBS or its parent company.

zh.title: 派拉蒙向FCC主席赠送昂贵礼物，同时公司正寻求监管部门批准交易
zh.summary: FCC主席在该公司寻求重大交易的监管批准期间，收到了来自哥伦比亚广播公司或其母公司派拉蒙至少63,000美元的门票。这些礼物引发了关于监管机构决策独立性的伦理和利益冲突问题。

title: 2026 Lucid Gravity Touring review: A strong act 2
summary: The 2026 Lucid Gravity Touring delivers quick performance, comfort, spaciousness, and agility despite its large size for an electric SUV. The vehicle represents a successful second act in Lucid's product lineup.
content: Quick, comfortable, roomy, and agile for a large electric SUV.

zh.title: 2026年Lucid Gravity Touring评测：完美续作
zh.summary: 2026款Lucid Gravity Touring尽管作为电动SUV体型较大，但仍提供快速性能、舒适性、宽敞空间和灵活性。该车代表了Lucid产品线中成功的第二幕。

title: Rocket Report: India's Vikram-1 nears debut flight; AST to become rocket company?
summary: India's Vikram-1 rocket is nearing its debut flight after completing rigorous ground testing. Satellite communications company AST is also exploring a transition into commercial rocket manufacturing.
content: "We have done everything that could be done to test Vikram-1 on ground."

zh.title: 火箭周报：印度Vikram-1火箭接近首飞；AST探索进入火箭制造领域
zh.summary: 在完成严格的地面测试后，印度的Vikram-1火箭即将首飞。卫星通讯公司AST也正在探索向商业火箭制造领域的转型。

title: The war on ‘woke science’ comes for space research
summary: The Trump administration proposes OMB rules granting political appointees direct control over federal science grant funding, potentially threatening groundbreaking research including Mars exploration and deep space astronomy. The proposal has drawn unprecedented public attention and concern from scientists.
content:
The Trump administration is waging a culture war on science, and the latest salvo is in the form of a dry,  bureaucratic proposal from the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) that could threaten the future of US science as we know it.
The proposal would give political appointees unprecedented control over grant funding, the method through which scientists receive federal money to perform groundbreaking space research such as the search for evidence of organic compounds on Mars or the discovery of some of the earliest galaxies in the universe. 
A typical proposed rule from the OMB garners less than 100 public comments. This rule has nette …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 对"觉醒科学"的战争波及太空研究
zh.summary: 特朗普政府提议的OMB规则将赋予政治任命者对联邦科学拨款的直接控制权，可能威胁到包括火星探索和深空天文学在内的突破性研究。该提案引起了科学家们前所未有的公众关注和担忧。

title: God Of War TV series is recasting Kratos
summary: Amazon's God of War TV series is recasting Kratos after original actor Ryan Hurst tore his bicep performing a stunt, requiring four completed episodes to be reshot. Production is paused and expected to resume in mid-October.
content:
Hurst (seen left as Kratos) had reportedly already completed four episodes of filming for the series. | Image: Amazon	

Amazon's upcoming God Of War show has hit a major snag - it's now on the hunt for a new Kratos, after an on-set injury put its current lead actor out of commission. Sons of Anarchy star Ryan Hurst was originally cast for the role in January, with Deadline reporting that four episodes of the God Of War production had been fully completed before he tore a bicep performing a stunt.
Production on the show has now been paused, and is eyeing to resume in mid-October. Unfortunately that isn't enough time for Hurst to fully recover from surgery. The completed episodes will now be reshot with a new actor, causing further delays to the show following …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《战神》电视剧克拉托斯角色重新选角
zh.summary: 亚马逊《战神》电视剧在原演员瑞恩·赫斯特执行特技时撕裂二头肌后重新选角克拉托斯，需要重新拍摄已完成的四集剧集。制作已暂停，预计将在十月中旬恢复。

title: SpaceX scrubs Starship launch after some of its engines didn't start
summary: SpaceX cancelled a Starship launch when several engines failed to start during countdown, forcing the team to offload propellant. The company expects to attempt another launch within days.
content: "Now offloading propellant. Next launch attempt hopefully in a few days."

zh.title: SpaceX取消星舰发射，部分引擎未能启动
zh.summary: SpaceX取消了星舰发射，因为多个引擎在倒计时期间未能启动，迫使团队卸载推进剂。该公司预计在几天内进行另一次发射尝试。
